name: code_analyzer
description: Perform static analysis on source code files to measure complexity, detect code smells, analyze imports, and extract function signatures. Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, and C#. Returns structured findings with line numbers.

path.description: Path to the project root directory to analyze recursively. Required unless 'file' is provided.

file.description: Path to a single file to analyze. When provided, 'path' is ignored.

language.description: Filter analysis to files of a specific language. Auto-detected from file extensions if not specified.

check.description: Which category of analysis to run. Defaults to 'all'.

output.description: Optional path to write the analysis result to a JSON file.

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
